case_title: CORI B. CONSTANTINE VS. CENTRAL PARKING SYSTEM, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,909.00 FILED BY CONSTANTINE, CORI B. AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL PARKING SYSTEM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETANED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CENTRAL PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONSTANTINE, CORI B. AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL PARKING SYSTEM, INC.

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-18-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL PARKING SYSTEM, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSTANTINE, CORI B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTRAL PARKING SYSTEM, INC. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,260.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
